title: Allegro MicroSystems Appoints Brian White to its Board of Directors
author: Not Specified
description: Allegro MicroSystems announced the appointment of Brian C. White as an independent director effective June 17, 2026. White brings over 30 years of semiconductor industry experience, including CFO roles at Ambarella, Maxim Integrated Products, and Integrated Device Technology. His expertise in financial strategy, governance, and capital allocation is expected to support Allegro's growth in AI data centers, robotics, and automotive markets.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The appointment of an experienced CFO with strong semiconductor industry background and governance expertise strengthens the board's financial and strategic capabilities. This signals confidence in the company's growth strategy and ability to create shareholder value in key markets like AI data centers, robotics, and automotive.

title: Nasdaq 100 Hits Record Above 30,000 On Micron's 18% Rally: Stock Market Today
author: Piero Cingari
description: The Nasdaq 100 crossed 30,000 during intraday trading as semiconductor stocks surged, led by Micron Technology's 18% gain following a UBS analyst price target hike to $1,625. The rally was driven by increased AI spending expectations from hyperscalers, with chip stocks dominating market leadership. The S&P 500 rose 0.6%, while the Russell 2000 outperformed with a 1.7% gain. AutoZone plunged 10.1% after missing revenue estimates despite beating EPS.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock surged 18% on UBS analyst price target hike to $1,625 (from $535), driven by strong AI memory demand expectations. Market cap exceeded $1 trillion for the first time, with stock up 200% year-to-date.
Jumped 12.3% tracking the broader semiconductor rally and benefiting from announced cash dividend, with no company-specific negative catalyst.
Rose 9.1% on sympathy buying with the semiconductor sector rotation, driven by positive AI infrastructure spending sentiment.
Climbed 8.7% lifted by the chip sector rotation and increased AI-related spending expectations.
Added 8.4% as part of the broader semiconductor and tech sector rally driven by AI infrastructure demand.
Gained 6.8% as cheaper jet fuel and Iran deal narrative boosted airline stocks, lifting the broader airline sector.
Plunged 10.1% despite beating EPS estimates, due to revenue miss ($4.84B vs $4.88B estimate) and soft domestic same-store sales of 4.1% against elevated expectations.
Dropped 6% as investors trimmed positions ahead of May 28 earnings announcement.

title: Allegro MicroSystems to Present at TD Cowen’s 54th Annual Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on Wednesday, May 27, 2026
author: Not Specified
description: Allegro MicroSystems announced it will present at TD Cowen's 54th Annual Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on May 27, 2026, with CFO Derek D'Antilio participating in a fireside chat. The company reported strong financial performance with Q4 2026 sales up 26% year-over-year to $243 million and full-year 2026 sales up 23% to $890 million.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrated strong financial performance with 26% year-over-year Q4 sales growth and 23% full-year growth, indicating robust business momentum. The company's participation in a major industry conference and investor engagement activities further support positive market positioning.

title: Allegro MicroSystems to Announce Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
author: Na
description: Allegro MicroSystems announced it will release its fourth quarter and fiscal year 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, prior to market open. CEO Mike Doogue and CFO Derek D'Antilio will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss results and business outlook. The company will provide a live webcast and archived audio accessible for 90 days.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article is a routine earnings announcement with standard procedural information about when and how financial results will be disclosed. There is no forward-looking guidance, performance metrics, or strategic announcements that would indicate positive or negative sentiment. It is purely informational in nature.

title: Tech Stocks Rebound, Crude Rallies Above $64 On Iran Tensions: What's Moving Markets Wednesday?
author: Piero Cingari
description: Tech stocks rebounded on Wednesday with the Nasdaq 100 jumping 1.4% past 25,000, led by software stocks. Cadence Design Systems surged nearly 10% after beating revenue estimates and projecting strong 2026 growth. Commodity markets rallied amid Middle East tensions, with oil climbing above $64 per barrel and gold surging past $5,000. However, Palo Alto Networks fell 6% despite beating quarterly expectations due to trimmed profit outlook.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock jumped nearly 10% after topping Q4 revenue estimates and projecting strong 2026 growth supported by AI-driven demand and share buybacks
AI darling surged 4.5% as part of broader tech sector rally
Fell 6% after trimming annual profit outlook despite beating quarterly expectations, sliding to levels last seen during April 2025 tariff shock
Declined 7% on the day, underperforming broader tech sector
Fell 11.17% despite broader commodity sector strength from oil rally
Gained 2.6% as gold surged past $5,000 per ounce amid geopolitical tensions
Gained 2.4% as crude oil jumped 3.6% above $64 per barrel on Iran tensions
Gained 1.9% as defense contractors outperformed amid Middle East geopolitical tensions
